---
title: "About me"
---

&nbsp; &nbsp;

I'm **David Causeur**, full professor of statistics

in the Department of Statistics and Computer Science,

at [Institut Agro](https://www.institut-agro-rennes-angers.fr/), Rennes, France.

I'm a research fellow at [IRMAR, UMR 6625 CNRS](https://irmar.univ-rennes1.fr/)

I'm the former President of the [French region](https://sfb.pages.math.cnrs.fr/asso/) of the [International Biometric Society](https://www.biometricsociety.org/home).

For more check out my [resume](DC-CV_short.pdf).

Contact me by [email].

[email]: mailto:david.causeur@institut-agro.fr

## News

Scancar, B. and Causeur, D. (2026). Les fausses publications scientifiques menacent de submerger
la recherche contre le cancer. **The Conversation**. 10.64628/AAK.csean3fs3 [Open access](https://theconversation.com/les-fausses-publications-scientifiques-menacent-de-submerger-la-recherche-contre-le-cancer-276465)

Scancar, B., Byrne, J., Causeur, D. and Barnett, A. (2026). Machine learning based screening
of potential paper mill publications in cancer research: methodological and cross sectional study.
**British Medical Journal**, Vol. 392. [Open access](https://www.bmj.com/content/392/bmj-2025-087581)

## Upcoming conferences

* March, 19-20, 2026 [JSTAR 2026](https://jstar2026.sciencesconf.org/), Rennes.
* June, 23-26, 2026, [Statistics, Exposome and Environmental Health](https://www.lebesgue.fr/fr/StatExpoHealth26), Rennes.
